name: Ferraghini metal twist action pen
summary: Elegant twist action ball pen from the Ferraghini brand made of metal with silver applications and a large capacity refill that writes in blue.
descriptionLong: Elegant twist action ball pen from the Ferraghini brand made of metal with silver applications and a large capacity refill that writes in blue.

name: VIVID ball pen
summary: Elegant ballpoint pen Pierre Cardin with a rotary mechanism. The ballpoint pen comes in three modern colours. Its upper part is made of black metal and the lower part of the pen has a smooth rubber surface finish, tha...
descriptionLong: Elegant ballpoint pen Pierre Cardin with a rotary mechanism. The ballpoint pen comes in three modern colours. Its upper part is made of black metal and the lower part of the pen has a smooth rubber surface finish, that is very pleasant to touch. The ballpoint pen contains a quality blue refill with the tip 1 mm. Packed in Pierre Cardin‘s luxurious pocket, comes with a certificate of authenticity.
